name: myinventory
description: MyInventory - Windows desktop warehouse management application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,windows -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @myinventory/api" "npm run dev -w @myinventory/windows"
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @myinventory/shared && npm run build -w @myinventory/web
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,windows -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev -w @myinventory/api" "npm run dev -w @myinventory/web" "npm run dev -w @myinventory/windows"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @myinventory/shared && npm run db:generate && npm run db:build && npm run build -w @myinventory/api && npm run build -w @myinventory/windows && npm run build -w @myinventory/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @myinventory/shared && npm run typecheck -w @myinventory/prisma && npm run typecheck -w @myinventory/api && npm run typecheck -w @myinventory/windows
scripts.postinstall: npm run db:generate && npm run db:build
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @myinventory/api && npm run lint -w @myinventory/windows
